zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Weyland於1346年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可奧可波洛時，她的父親Robert de Weyland47歲，母親Cecily de Baldock34歲。她於1371年與Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1416年6月15日在英國英格蘭素福爾可享年70歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可特福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Weyland于1346年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可奧可波洛时，她的父亲Robert de Weyland47岁，母亲Cecily de Baldock34岁。她于1371年与Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1416年6月15日在英国英格兰素福爾可享年70岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可特福德。

nameMeanings.name: Weyland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt.

variants.name: Wieland
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin, Otto, Heinz, Dieter, Dietrich, Erdmann, Florian, Franz, Fritz, Gerhard.

German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wīg ‘war’ + land ‘land, territory’. This name was borne by the supernaturally skilled smith of ancient Germanic folk legend, and for this reason it may in part have been given as a nickname to blacksmiths.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): presumably an adoption of the German surname.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Weyland was born in 1346, in Oxborough, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert de Weyland, was 47 and her mother, Cecily de Baldock, was 34. She married Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham in 1371, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 15 June 1416, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70, and was buried in Thetford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Weyland est née en 1346, à Oxborough, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Weyland, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Cecily de Baldock, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham en 1371, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 juin 1416, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Thetford, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Weyland 1346 in Oxborough, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Weyland 47 und ihre Mutter Cecily de Baldock 34. Sie hat 1371 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. Juni 1416 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Thetford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Weyland è nata il nel 1346 nel Oxborough, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert de Weyland, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Cecily de Baldock, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham nel 1371, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 15 giugno 1416, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Thetford, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Weylandが1346年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクオクスボロウで生まれた時，父Robert de Weylandは47歳，母Cecily de Baldockは34歳であった。1371年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでSir John of Oxborough de de Tudenhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1416年6月15日にイギリスイギリススフォルクで70歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクスエトフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Weyland(이)가 1346년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 스버루에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Weyland(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecily de Baldock(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1371년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1416년 6월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 테트퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Weyland nasceu em 1346, em Oxborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Weyland, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Cecily de Baldock, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham em 1371, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de junho de 1416, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Weyland родилась в 1346 г. в местности оксбороую, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert de Weyland было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily de Baldock, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham в 1371 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 15 июня 1416 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности тетфорд, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Weyland nació en 1346, en Oxborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Weyland, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Cecily de Baldock, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham en 1371, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 15 de junio de 1416, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
